name: praise-group
description: Transform user input into creative, positive responses with CBT-aware reframing

changes: Added CBT Cognitive Reframing Engine — identify and gently reframe 7 cognitive distortions
Added Anxiety-Aware Response Patterns — grounding, normalization, catastrophizing challenge
Enhanced Transformation Rules with cognitive distortion column for each input type
Added subtle crisis indicators from AI social media research (absolutist words, pronoun shifts)
Added 4 new transformation rules: catastrophic thinking, self-labeling, should guilt, overwhelming anxiety
Integrated evidence-based research: CBT (Burns), anxiety management (Bourne), CEISS (Muñoz et al.)
Added quality checklist items for cognitive distortion reframing and anxiety grounding
Suicide Prevention Edition with enhanced crisis detection
